title: stachys corsica
intro: Stachys corsica, also known as Corsican betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Corsican betony has been employed to treat various ailments, including fever, headaches, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties of anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Corsican betony include reduced anxiety and stress levels, improved sleep quality, and enhanced cognitive function. Corsican betony can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to create a soothing and calming effect.
